subcodes.first_line: The placing of diacritical marks upon the blessed words according to the rules of Arabic grammar is permissible; the authentic verses should be intoned, not those that are doubtful and may contain scribal errors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اعراب کلمات مبارکه بقاعدهٴ عربیّه جائز ، آیات صحیحه را باید ترتیل نمود نه آیات مشکوکه که احتمال غلط از کاتب دارد
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @law of Huququ'llah, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
